title: Imaging
description: The Imaging module provides DICOM medical image viewing and management. Upload DICOM files, browse imaging studies, and view images with clinical-grade tools including windowing, zoom, pan, and measurement overlays powered by Cornerstone3D.
tips: Upload DICOM files (.dcm) or ZIP archives containing DICOM series.
The viewer supports standard radiology tools: window/level, zoom, pan, scroll, and length measurement.
Studies are organized by patient, study date, and series for easy navigation.
WADO-RS endpoints serve images to the Cornerstone3D viewer for high-performance rendering.
Imaging studies can be linked to OMOP procedure_occurrence records for cohort-level imaging analysis.
